name: Dog Car Seat Cover Black - Open Story™
description:
Get your pet ready for vet trips, day trips, beach outings or picnics with the help of this Pet Travel Car Blanket from Open Story™. Made from 100% recycled polyester fabric, this pet car blanket features a quilted design to provide your furry friend a cozy spot to sit back and relax while on the go. It's designed with headrest straps for easy securing over the seat to help keep your car clean. Plus, it features a small pocket to stash their leash or other small accessories. The blanket also comes with its own carrying tote bag for added convenience.

Open Story™: Every journey inspires a new chapter.
